meta.note: Real family data, built generation-by-generation from Grant John Kozak per his own request, using only facts he confirmed directly plus fresh web research (not the earlier kozak-genealogy project's sources/hypotheses). Every non-user-provided fact below is source-cited. prob:true marks an unconfirmed or circumstantial identification.

kozak-1.name: Grant John Kozak
facts: Mark Kozak and Nancy Marion (Relihan) Kozak

kozak-2.name: Mark Kozak
kozak-2.note: Grant's father. Living as of the source obituary (2020), Palm Beach FL.

kozak-3.name: Nancy Marion (Relihan) Kozak
kozak-3.note: Grant's mother. Living as of the source obituary (2020), Palm Beach FL.

kozak-4.name: John J. Kozak
kozak-4.note: b.Jan 7 1924 · d.Sep 6 2020 Norwich CT -- long-time Norwich CT resident, teacher and principal in Connecticut schools. S01
facts: Teacher and principal, Connecticut public schools

kozak-5.name: Helen Ustaseski
kozak-5.note: Married John J. Kozak Nov 1955 ("Golden Street neighbor"). S01. Predeceased John. A 2009 obituary for John's sister Jennie names every other in-law spouse but omits Helen -- possible sign she died notably earlier than 2020, not confirmed. S02

openQuestions.text: Find Helen Ustaseski's own parents and exact death date -- not found via web search; likely requires a paid genealogy database login or Norwich CT vital records request.

kozak-6.name: Thomas P. Relihan Sr.
kozak-6.note: b.Sep 16 1930 Bridgeport CT · d.Dec 16 1990 Woodbridge CT. Married Dorothy M. Shomsky in 1953. S03

kozak-7.name: Dorothy M. Shomsky Relihan
kozak-7.note: b.Nov 26 1931 · d.Jun 16 1988, buried Northwest Cemetery, Woodbridge CT. S04

kozak-12.name: John J. Relihan
kozak-12.note: b.1889 · d.1955. Thomas P. Relihan Sr.'s father. S05

kozak-13.name: Anna E. (Dooley) Relihan
kozak-13.note: b.1895 · d.1961. Thomas P. Relihan Sr.'s mother. S05

kozak-14.name: Michael Shomsky
kozak-14.note: Dorothy Shomsky Relihan's father, of Bridgeport CT. S06

kozak-15.name: Mary (Demchak) Shomsky
kozak-15.note: b.1915 · d.Jul 1 2003 Bridgeport CT, age 87. Retired inspector, Remington Arms, 35+ years. S06

kozak-sib-cindy.name: Cindy (Kozak) Buckley
kozak-sib-cindy.note: Mark Kozak's sister. Husband Tom Buckley, of Avon CT. S01

kozak-sib-david.name: David Kozak
kozak-sib-david.note: Mark Kozak's brother. Wife Elizabeth, of West Hartford CT. S01

kozak-cousin-hilary.name: Hilary Kozak
kozak-cousin-hilary.note: Listed as a grandchild of John J. Kozak alongside Grant -- child of Cindy Buckley or David Kozak, exact parent not yet determined. S01

openQuestions.text: Determine whether Hilary is Cindy's or David's child.

kozak-cousin-john.name: John Kozak (grandchild)
kozak-cousin-john.note: Listed as a grandchild of John J. Kozak alongside Grant (distinct person from grandfather John J. Kozak) -- child of Cindy Buckley or David Kozak, exact parent not yet determined. S01

openQuestions.text: Determine whether this John is Cindy's or David's child.

kozak-cousin-collin.name: Collin Kozak
kozak-cousin-collin.note: Listed as a grandchild of John J. Kozak alongside Grant -- child of Cindy Buckley or David Kozak, exact parent not yet determined. S01

openQuestions.text: Determine whether Collin is Cindy's or David's child.

kozak-sib-jennie.name: Jennie A. Kozak
kozak-sib-jennie.note: John J. Kozak's sister. d.Feb 18 2009. Her own obituary is the source for the Helen Ustaseski death-timing flag above. S02

relihan-sib-thomas.name: Thomas Relihan
relihan-sib-thomas.note: Nancy (Relihan) Kozak's brother, per Mary Demchak Shomsky's obituary listing him as her grandchild. S07. Possible (unconfirmed) match: a Thomas P. Relihan Jr. registered as an officer of a landscaping company in Woodbridge CT, same town as the family plot.

openQuestions.text: Confirm whether the Woodbridge CT landscaping-company Thomas P. Relihan Jr. is this person.

relihan-sib-robert.name: Robert Relihan
relihan-sib-robert.note: Nancy (Relihan) Kozak's brother, per Mary Demchak Shomsky's obituary listing him as her grandchild. S07. No further biographical detail found.

relihan-sib-betsy.name: Betsy (Relihan) Gross
relihan-sib-betsy.note: Nancy (Relihan) Kozak's sister, per Mary Demchak Shomsky's obituary listing her as "Betsy Gross," a grandchild. S07. Possible (unconfirmed) match: an Elizabeth M. Relihan / Elizabeth N. Gross of Woodbridge CT, linked to a Jay Gross.

openQuestions.text: Confirm the Woodbridge CT Elizabeth Relihan/Gross identification.

relihan-cousin-lindsay.name: Lindsay Relihan

openQuestions.text: Determine whether Lindsay is Thomas's or Robert's daughter.

shomsky-sib-robert.name: Robert Michael Shomsky
shomsky-sib-robert.note: Dorothy Shomsky Relihan's brother. b.1935 · d.2011. S06 S07

shomsky-sib-ronald.name: Ronald George Shomsky
shomsky-sib-ronald.note: Dorothy Shomsky Relihan's brother. b.May 10 1939 Bridgeport CT · d.2014, of Milford CT. Wife Kathy. Children Maureen and David Shomsky. S06

S01.citation: John J. Kozak Obituary, Dignity Memorial (Norwich, CT)
S01.notes: Names parents (Nicholas Kozak, Anna Byczkowska Kozak), marriage to Helen Ustaseski (Nov 1955), children (Mark, Cindy Buckley, David Kozak) and grandchildren (Grant, Hilary, John, Collin Kozak).

S02.citation: Jennie Kozak Obituary, The Day / Legacy.com
S02.notes: Lists every other in-law spouse by name but omits Helen -- circumstantial evidence she may have died notably earlier than 2020. Not independently verified; original text only accessible via search-result summary.
S02.dataQuirk: Could not directly fetch original obituary text (403); relying on search-engine snippet.

S03.citation: Thomas P. Relihan, Find a Grave
S03.notes: Birth/death dates, birthplace, marriage year, and parents (John J. Relihan, Anna E. Dooley Relihan).

S04.citation: Dorothy M. Shomsky Relihan, Find a Grave
S04.notes: Birth/death dates, burial location, marriage year.

S05.clue: Find a Grave memorial (via son Thomas P. Relihan Sr.'s page)
S05.citation: John J. Relihan / Anna E. Dooley Relihan family record
S05.notes: Dates and names of Thomas P. Relihan Sr.'s parents and two sisters (Ann Terese Lang, Margaret Mellott).

S06.citation: Obituary for Ronald G. Shomsky, Cody-White Funeral Service
S06.notes: Names parents (Michael Shomsky, Mary Demchak Shomsky) and siblings (Dorothy Relihan, Robert Shomsky, Richard "Skip" Shomsky).

S07.citation: Mary Demchak Shomsky, Find a Grave
S07.notes: Lists children (Dorothy Relihan, Robert Shomsky, Ronald Shomsky, Richard Shomsky), and grandchildren including Thomas Relihan, Nancy Kozak, Betsy Gross, and Robert Relihan -- the primary source establishing Nancy's siblings.
S07.dataQuirk: Direct fetch blocked (403); relied on search-engine indexed snippet and a text-extraction proxy, cross-checked twice.

1.title: Session 1: base generation-by-generation build from Grant John Kozak
1.summary: Per Grant's explicit request, started fresh from himself as the confirmed root rather than reconciling the earlier project's multiple disconnected trees. Confirmed generations 0-2 directly from Grant. Web research (not the earlier project's sources) confirmed three of four generation-3 great-grandparent pairs, all of generation-1 siblings on both sides (Mark's and Nancy's), and one generation of Gen-2-level siblings found along the way. One real gap remains: Helen Ustaseski's own parents were not found via web search and likely require paid genealogy database access or a vital records request.
